evidence: All 7 services report status=healthy. Coordinator systemHealth=83.3 (6/7 healthy services). All partitions have correct chain assignments.
XLEN=5004, lag=5004, entries-read=974, pending=0. Execution engine consumed 974 messages then stopped reading. 5004 unread messages accumulating.
expected: Consumer should continuously read from stream
actual: Consumer stalled after initial batch. Execution stats show 973 opportunitiesReceived matching entries-read=974.
recommendation: Investigate why execution engine consumer stopped reading after initial batch. Possible rate limiting, circuit breaker trip recovery, or consumer loop exit.

evidence: XLEN=933, lag=744, entries-read=189, pending=7. Coordinator only read 189 of 933 execution results.
expected: Coordinator should keep up with execution results
actual: Coordinator falling behind on reading execution results (lag=744)
recommendation: Coordinator may be prioritizing other streams. Monitor if lag stabilizes or grows.

evidence: Coordinator health shows backpressure active with executionStreamDepthRatio=1.0002. XLEN=5004 vs MAXLEN=5000. Stream is at capacity.
expected: Backpressure should activate when stream approaches MAXLEN (correct behavior)
actual: Backpressure correctly activated. But root cause is execution engine consumer stall (RT-005).
recommendation: Fix RT-005 (execution consumer stall) to allow stream to drain. Backpressure activation itself is correct behavior.

evidence: riskState=CAUTION, positionSizeMultiplier=0.75, tradingAllowed=true. 132 failed executions out of 933 attempts (14.15% failure rate). All failures are 'Simulated execution failure (random)'.
actual: CAUTION state — simulated random failures triggered drawdown breaker to CAUTION. 75% position sizing.
recommendation: Expected in simulation with random failures. The drawdown breaker correctly responds to loss patterns. Consider adjusting simulation failure rate or drawdown thresholds for simulation mode.

evidence: lag=257, pending=50 (at time of check). Cross-chain detector falling behind on price updates.
recommendation: Cross-chain detector may be CPU-bound (ML LSTM processing). Monitor if lag stabilizes. 122MB memory usage suggests TFjs overhead.

evidence: All counters incrementing between scrapes (15s apart): pipeline_events_total 185→229, price_updates_total 6406→7032, events_processed_total 185→229, cross_chain_detection_cycles_total 864→1087

P1: stream_length, stream_pending, pipeline_latency_p50/p95/p99, pipeline_events_total, events_processed_total, price_updates_total all present. Execution: arbitrage_execution_attempts_total, arbitrage_executions_total, arbitrage_execution_success_total, arbitrage_gas_price_gwei, arbitrage_queue_depth, arbitrage_active_executions all present. Cross-chain: cross_chain_opportunities_total, cross_chain_detection_cycles_total present.
actual: All required metrics present across all scraped services

evidence: Pipeline latency: p50=3ms, p95=3ms, p99=3ms. Well under 50ms target (ADR-022).
All chains report gas_price_gwei=0 (ethereum, arbitrum, optimism, base, bsc, polygon, avalanche, fantom, zksync, linea, blast, scroll, mantle, mode). healthyProviders=0.
expected: Non-zero gas prices in production, but zero expected in simulation mode (no real RPC connections)
actual: All zero — simulation mode with no real providers
recommendation: Expected in simulation. In production, verify gas price feeds are active.

evidence: Overall win rate: 85.85% (801 successes / 933 attempts). 56 unique chain/strategy keys tracked. All failures are 'Simulated execution failure (random)'.
Bridge recovery isRunning=false, metrics=null. No bridge transactions in simulation mode.
P1=325MB (high due to SharedArrayBuffer price matrix + 1095 pairs), P2=83MB, P3=48MB, P4=44MB, Execution=55MB, Cross-chain=122MB (TFjs ML). Redis=22.58MB/512MB (4.4%).
actual: P1 is highest at 325MB but acceptable for SharedArrayBuffer workload. All others well within limits.
recommendation: P1 memory is elevated but expected due to price matrix with 1095 total pairs (360+180+420+135). Monitor for growth.

evidence: All chains connected and producing data. P1: bsc(2949), polygon(524), avalanche(2117), fantom(727). P2: arbitrum(4290), optimism(1413), base(2437), scroll(708), blast(439). P3: ethereum(2565), zksync(442), linea(265). P4: solana(33390).

All services return required fields. Coordinator: status, uptime, isLeader, services, backpressure. Partitions: status, uptime, eventsProcessed, chains (all arrays). Execution: status, uptime, simulationMode, queueSize, activeExecutions, successRate, riskState. Cross-chain: status, uptime, chainsMonitored, mlPredictorActive.

13/13 discovered streams have correct consumer groups. coordinator-group on: price-updates, opportunities, execution-results, health, whale-alerts, swap-events, volume-aggregates, dead-letter-queue, forwarding-dlq. cross-chain-detector-group on: price-updates, whale-alerts, pending-opportunities. execution-engine-group on: execution-requests. failover-coordinator on: system-failover.
